allow: PowerShell($handle = \(& "C:\\Windows\\System32\\handle.exe" -a "\\Device\\Serial5" 2>$null\); if \(-not $handle\) { "handle.exe not found - trying alternate method" }; Get-Process | Where-Object { try { $_.Modules | Where-Object { $_.FileName -match "serial|com" } } catch { $false } } | Select-Object Name, Id)
